mapper.select: SELECT public_id FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT public_id FROM posts WHERE caption = #{caption} LIMIT 1

SELECT pi.object_key FROM post_images pi INNER JOIN posts p ON p.public_id = pi.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.public_id = p.user_id WHERE u.email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com' OR p.caption LIKE '[STG] %'
mapper.delete: DELETE r FROM replies r LEFT JOIN replies child ON child.parent_id = r.public_id LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.public_id = r.post_id LEFT JOIN users post_user ON post_user.public_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN users reply_user ON reply_user.public_id = r.user_id WHERE child.public_id IS NULL AND ( post_user.email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com' OR reply_user.email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com' OR p.caption LIKE '[STG] %' OR r.message LIKE '[STG] %' )

DELETE pi FROM post_images pi INNER JOIN posts p ON p.public_id = pi.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.public_id = p.user_id WHERE u.email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com' OR p.caption LIKE '[STG] %'
DELETE p FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.public_id = p.user_id WHERE u.email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com' OR p.caption LIKE '[STG] %'
DELETE FROM users WHERE email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com'
